candidate.description: Application reads from cache first, on miss fetches from source and populates cache; writes go to source and invalidate or update cache entry.

l2s.scope_1line: Read-through pattern where app checks cache, falls back to source, then populates cache.
Writes propagate synchronously to cache and backing store.
Writes to cache only, deferred async flush to backing store.

l1s.scope_1line: Patterns for storing frequently accessed data closer to consumers.
Strategies for keeping cached data consistent with source of truth.
